# Itay Shechter

> Hebrew-language personal portfolio for Itay Shechter (איתי שכטר), Social Media Lead. Built communities of 100K+ across V1, Fresh Agency, HOT, and Knesset Channel 11.

## About

- [Home](https://itayshechter.com/): single-page portfolio with bio, work history, skills, contact
